notes: v0.21.0 — LANCE UNLOCKED. Third playable class with charged razor-beam mechanic. Hold LMB to charge (max 1.30s), release to fire a hitscan beam. OVERCHARGE variant: damage linearly scales 12→130, pierce count 1→6, full-charge (95%+) ignores walls. Movement throttled to 50% while charging — commit to the shot. Telegraph: dotted laser-sight along aim while charging (visible to PvP opponent). 0.65s cooldown after firing. Beam damage routes through the same pipeline as bullets (PvP-safe via PvPNet). New PvP RPCs: sc_remote_lance_charge / sc_remote_lance_beam for opponent-side telegraph + visual mirror. LANCE is unlocked at account LV 0 (no unlock gate) — was coming_soon. Base stats: 0.85x HP / 0.90x speed / 1.45x damage per shot. Lab artefact: test_lance_charge.gd kept for future tuning passes.
